-  CTLineBreakMode.byTruncatingTail 

Case# CTLineBreakMode.byTruncatingTail

iOSiPadOSMac CatalystmacOStvOSvisionOSwatchOS

```
case byTruncatingTail
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/coretext/ctlinebreakmode/bytruncatingtail#Discussion)

Each line is displayed so that the beginning fits in the container and the missing text is indicated by an ellipsis glyph.
